title: Unified pH measurement v2
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"elli","text":"The purpose of this document is to present technical guidance of measuring pHabsH2O difference (ΔpHabsH2O value) between two solutions by differential potentiometry in a cell with two compartments connected by a salt bridge filled with an ionic liquid.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":77,"length":3},{"style":"sub","offset":99,"length":3},{"style":"sup","offset":80,"length":3},{"style":"sup","offset":102,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"4st41","text":"Turn on the thermostat and electrometer at least half an hour before starting the work.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"786vi","text":"The ionic liquid triethylpentylammonium bis(trifluoromethylsulfonyl)imide [N2225][NTf2] salt bridge has to be used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":76,"length":4},{"style":"sub","offset":85,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Start Quick IV Measurement Software. Computer cannot go to sleep during measurements or the communication between computer and instruments is lost and data collection stops.
On the left hand pick Function “Source & Sampling”. Position of the Function choice “Source & Sampling”. Alternatively, open previously saved QIVM file with measurement settings.

Right hand side click on tab “Channel Communication”. Click on “Search Channels”, which opens a new window. Select USB interface and search for the channel. After the search click on the channel name to choose the channel and close the window. Position of the tabs “Channel Communication” and “Search Channels”. This must be done every time the program is started.

Settings can be saved as QIVM file, which can be used for measurements. The saved file can be opened under tab “File”. The settings will remain the same between the measurements if the program is not closed. Program settings.

Cell from Gebr. Rettberg GmbH. 25.0 °C VistaShield (Faraday cage, Gamry, VistaShield) UT cell (Special water-jacketed glass cell, Rettberg, Glass cell) CORIO CD-200F (Refrigerated / heating circulator, Corio, 9012701.03, https://www.julabo.com/en/products/refrigerated-circulators/refrigerated-heating-circulators/corio-cd-200f ) The side ports must be open.

Fill capillary with a syringe or pipette with the ionic liquid, so that the level of ionic liquid is 1 mm to 2 mm below the bottoms of the measurement compartments. 0.1 mL Ionic liquid has high viscosity, therefore flows very slowly, and can leave a film on the wall of the pipette tip or syringe during dispense.

The test solutions are added simultaneously to both compartments, raising solution levels in the compartments synchronously. 20 mL, both test solutions Equal amount by weight (not volume!) of solutions must be used. The volume of the lighter solution is calculated from the weight of the heavier solution using the densities of the two solutions in hand. This is especially important for solutions containing acetonitrile. Minimum volume that can be used is 13 ml. One option how to fill the cell. This configuration gives positive ΔpH values. Figure shows connections to a pH meter, a potentiostat and an electrometer.
After adding the test solutions, the air bubbles are removed from the capillary ends with a syringe or a pipette.
Insert electrodes one-by-one. EST-0601 (Glass electrode half-cell, Izmeritelnaya tekhnika, EST-0601)
Electrode is rinsed with water, gently dried, and then rinsed with solution to be measured.
Connect electrodes to the instrument. B2987A Electrometer / High Resistance Meter (Electrometer, Keysight, B2987A, https://www.keysight.com/zz/en/home.html )

Crocodile clips are as following: red is signal and connects to ISE1, black is shield and is connected to ISE2 and green is guard. Green stays unused. Connections to electrodes. Cable goes through the port in Faraday cage. Electrometer is not in the Faraday cage. N1415A Triax to Alligator Cable (Cable, Keysight Technologies, N1415A, https://www.keysight.com/zz/en/product/N1415A/triax-alligator-cable-200-v-1-5-m.html )
Start the measurement by clicking on the "Measure" button on the upper panel.
Data collection. Point is taken at 10 s interval.
Save data. Files are named as Date_ISE1_Solution1_vs_ISE2_solution2. SAVE THE FILE BEFORE NEW MEASUREMENT! Otherwise, data is lost. Data is given in volts and seconds.

Go to table view, right click on the table, choose “Export as CSV…” and save the results. The data can be automatically imported into excel file while measuring or after (both under “Excel Navigation”), but this causes constant shift in the comma position.
Remove the electrodes, rinse them and put them in storage solution.
Remove the solutions.
Rinse the cell with small amount of ethanol 5 mL
Rinse three times with plenty of water 20 mL, each
Rinse once with acetone to ease the drying. 5 mL
Dry cell with compressed air.
Points from most stable 15 min is used. The standard deviation of the points must be ≤ 1 mV and the drift ≤ 4 mV/h. Otherwise the measurement is left out from minimization.
Take the average of the chosen data points.
ΔpH = Δ E / average slope of the glass electrodes Calibration of glass electrode half-cells by Agnes Heering
Insert the ΔpH into the ladder. Symmetry 2020 , 12 (7), 1150; https://doi.org/10.3390/sym12071150
Repeat with a new pair of solutions.
Repeat the data analysis with all the measured potentials.
Insert the data into the ladder.
Do the minimization process. Symmetry 2020 , 12 (7), 1150; https://doi.org/10.3390/sym12071150
Obtain the pH values for all the measured solutions from the minimization process.
Calculate uncertainty. Analytica Chimica Acta , 2021 , 1182, 338923, doi.org/10.1016/j.aca.2021.338923
creator: Agnes Heering
